title: British Museum Postpones Jewish Cultural Event, Citing Threat of Disruption
summary_full: The cancellation comes amid a rise in racial and religious crimes in Britain as well as growing sense of unease for some of London’s Jews.
summary_public: The cancellation comes amid a rise in racial and religious crimes in Britain as well as growing sense of unease for some of London’s Jews.
